prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约1220名→1451名→2981名→1965名→1809名，整体呈波动走势。2023年出现异常大幅后移至2981名，2024年迅速回弹 至1965名，2025年进一步前移至1809名，近两年呈持续前移趋势，2025年基准位次约1809名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为9人，2025年缩减至 7人，2026年扩至10人，较2025年增加3人（增幅约42.9%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争压力有显著缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海外国语大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第93名→2026年第81名，排名提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2026年高考周期声誉 评价为中性/混合（空调费争议，无重大负面舆情）；抖音热度排名第49位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年曾有一次师德师风负面事件，但已过去多年，影响基本消退；外国语言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心优势；招生专业涵盖法语、西班牙语、商务英语、新闻传播学类、法学等，均依托外国语言文学A+学科优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业2024年社会热度为一般观望，整体偏冷；新闻传播类2023年明显劝退，但上外新传专业依托A+学科仍具竞争力；法学热度分化观望。海南省2026年考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；上海外国语大学位 于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强；海南省考生对上海高校有较高报考热情，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1809名、2026年大幅扩招（7→10人，+42. 9%）对位次的后移作用、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%对竞争的加剧效应、学校软科排名持续上升对吸引力的提升，以及外语类专业社会热度偏冷等因素，预计2026年最低录取位 次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约2244名，区间1840–2648名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法语（双学位）（国际政治双学位）
- 西班牙语
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新闻传播学类（卓越国际新闻传播人才计划）
- 商务英语（双学位）（会计学双学位）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1840–2648名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1840名以内）可重点冲刺法语（双学位）和西班牙语等王 牌专业；位次在区间中段（约2200名左右）以新闻传播学类和商务英语（双学位）为主；位次接近区间上限（约2600名）以法学为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province were approximately 1220 → 1451 → 2981 → 1965 → 1809, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, there was an abnormal large drop to 2981, but it quickly rebounded to 1965 in 2024, and further moved forward to 1809 in 2025, with a continuous forward trend in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1809. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 9 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025, and expanded to 10 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (approximately 42.9%) compared to 2025. This significant expansion has a notable alleviating effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026. This improvement reflects the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, increasing its appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy, no major negative public opinion). It ranks 49th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. There was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics in 2022, but it has been several years and the impact has largely faded. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country) and is the core advantage of the university. The enrollment majors include French, Spanish, Business English, Journalism and Communication, Law, etc., all leveraging the advantage of the A+ discipline in Foreign Language and Literature.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors is generally lukewarm and relatively cold. Journalism and Communication majors saw a clear discouragement trend in 2023, but SISU's Journalism and Communication majors, relying on the A+ discipline, remain competitive. Law majors show a divided and wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal. Candidates from Hainan Province have a high enthusiasm for applying to universities in Shanghai, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1809 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (7→10, +42.9%) which pushes the ranking backward, the approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province which intensifies competition, the continuous rise in the Soft Science ranking which enhances attractiveness, and the relatively cold social popularity of foreign language majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2244, with a range of 1840–2648.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- French (Double Degree) (International Politics Double Degree)
- Spanish
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding International Journalism Talent Program)
- Business English (Double Degree) (Accounting Double Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1840–2648, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1840), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as French (Double Degree) and Spanish. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 2200), prioritize Journalism and Communication and Business English (Double Degree). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2600), choose Law as a safe option.
